name: Magi NFTs
description: Deploy and manage your own NFT contracts on the Magi network

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initialize a new NFT contract with name, symbol, and optional base URI.

parameters.name: Collection Name
parameters.hintText: The name of your NFT collection (e.g. 'My NFTs').

parameters.name: Symbol
parameters.hintText: The ticker symbol for your collection (e.g. 'MNFT').

parameters.name: Base URI
parameters.hintText: Base URI for token metadata. Token-specific URIs will be appended to this.

parameters.name: Track Minted
parameters.hintText: Track total minted count per token ID. Enables the totalMinted query.

functions.name: mint
functions.description: Mint new NFT tokens. Only the contract owner can mint.

parameters.name: To
parameters.hintText: The recipient address.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to mint.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: Number of tokens to mint for this ID.

parameters.name: Max Supply
parameters.hintText: Maximum supply for this token ID. Only set on first mint.

parameters.name: Soulbound
parameters.hintText: Make this token non-transferable (soulbound). Only set on first mint.

parameters.name: Properties
parameters.hintText: Custom properties for this token (JSON string).

parameters.name: Properties Template
parameters.hintText: Template for per-edition properties.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.hintText: Additional data passed to the receiver.

functions.name: mintBatch
functions.description: Mint multiple token IDs in a single transaction. Owner only.

parameters.name: To
parameters.hintText: The recipient address.

parameters.name: Token IDs (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated list of token IDs to mint.

parameters.name: Amounts (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated list of amounts for each token ID.

parameters.name: Max Supplies (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated max supplies for each token ID.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.hintText: Additional data passed to the receiver.

functions.name: mintSeries
functions.description: Mint a numbered series of tokens (e.g. card-1, card-2, ...) in a single transaction. Owner only.

parameters.name: To
parameters.hintText: The recipient address.

parameters.name: ID Prefix
parameters.hintText: Prefix for generated token IDs (e.g. 'card-' produces card-1, card-2, ...).

parameters.name: Start Number
parameters.hintText: The first number in the series.

parameters.name: Count
parameters.hintText: How many tokens to create in the series.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: Copies per token ID.

parameters.name: Max Supply
parameters.hintText: Maximum supply per token ID (1 = unique, >1 = editioned).

parameters.name: Soulbound
parameters.hintText: Make all tokens in the series non-transferable.

parameters.name: Properties
parameters.hintText: Custom properties shared by all tokens (JSON string).

parameters.name: Properties Template
parameters.hintText: If set, the first token becomes the properties template for the rest.

functions.name: safeTransferFrom
functions.description: Transfer NFT tokens from one address to another.

parameters.name: From
parameters.hintText: The sender address.

parameters.name: To
parameters.hintText: The recipient address.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to transfer.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: Number of tokens to transfer.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.hintText: Additional data passed to the receiver.

functions.name: safeBatchTransferFrom
functions.description: Transfer multiple token IDs in a single transaction.

parameters.name: From
parameters.hintText: The sender address.

parameters.name: To
parameters.hintText: The recipient address.

parameters.name: Token IDs (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated list of token IDs to transfer.

parameters.name: Amounts (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated list of amounts for each token ID.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.hintText: Additional data passed to the receiver.

functions.name: burn
functions.description: Burn NFT tokens, reducing the supply for that token ID.

parameters.name: From
parameters.hintText: The address to burn tokens from.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to burn.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: Number of tokens to burn.

functions.name: burnBatch
functions.description: Burn multiple token IDs in a single transaction.

parameters.name: From
parameters.hintText: The address to burn tokens from.

parameters.name: Token IDs (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated list of token IDs to burn.

parameters.name: Amounts (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated list of amounts for each token ID.

functions.name: setApprovalForAll
functions.description: Grant or revoke an operator's permission to transfer all your tokens.

parameters.name: Operator
parameters.hintText: The operator address to approve or revoke.

parameters.name: Approved
parameters.hintText: Whether to approve or revoke the operator.

functions.name: approve
functions.description: Set a per-token allowance for a spender. Unlike setApprovalForAll, this approves a specific token ID and amount.

parameters.name: Spender
parameters.hintText: The address allowed to spend this token.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to approve.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: Number of tokens the spender can transfer. Set to 0 to revoke.

functions.name: setURI
functions.description: Set the metadata URI for a specific token ID. Owner only.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to set the URI for.

parameters.name: URI
parameters.hintText: The metadata URI for this token.

functions.name: setBaseURI
functions.description: Set the base URI for all token metadata. Owner only.

parameters.name: Base URI
parameters.hintText: The base URI prepended to all token URIs.

functions.name: setProperties
functions.description: Set custom properties for a specific token ID. Owner only.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to set properties for.

parameters.name: Properties
parameters.hintText: Custom properties as a JSON string.

functions.name: setCollectionMetadata
functions.description: Set collection-level metadata (JSON). Owner only.

parameters.name: Metadata
parameters.hintText: Collection metadata as a JSON string.

functions.name: changeOwner
functions.description: Transfer contract ownership to a new address. Only the current owner can call this.

parameters.name: New Owner
parameters.hintText: The address of the new contract owner.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Pause the contract, preventing all transfers and minting. Owner only.

functions.name: unpause
functions.description: Unpause the contract, re-enabling transfers and minting. Owner only.

functions.name: balanceOf
functions.description: Query the balance of a specific token ID for an account.

parameters.name: Account
parameters.hintText: The address to check the balance of.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to query.

functions.name: balanceOfBatch
functions.description: Query balances for multiple account/token ID pairs.

parameters.name: Accounts (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated list of account addresses.

parameters.name: Token IDs (comma separated)
parameters.hintText: Comma-separated list of token IDs (must match accounts length).

functions.name: isApprovedForAll
functions.description: Check if an operator is approved to manage all tokens of an account.

parameters.name: Account
parameters.hintText: The token owner address.

parameters.name: Operator
parameters.hintText: The operator address to check.

functions.name: uri
functions.description: Query the metadata URI for a specific token ID.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to query.

functions.name: getOwner
functions.description: Query the current owner of the contract.

functions.name: getInfo
functions.description: Query the collection metadata: name, symbol, base URI, and owner.

functions.name: isPaused
functions.description: Query whether the contract is currently paused.

functions.name: totalSupply
functions.description: Query the current total supply for a specific token ID.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to query.

functions.name: maxSupply
functions.description: Query the maximum supply for a specific token ID.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to query.

functions.name: totalMinted
functions.description: Query the total number of tokens ever minted for a token ID (requires trackMinted).

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to query.

functions.name: exists
functions.description: Check if a specific token ID has been minted.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to check.

functions.name: isSoulbound
functions.description: Check if a specific token ID is soulbound (non-transferable).

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to check.

functions.name: getProperties
functions.description: Query the custom properties for a specific token ID.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to query.

functions.name: allowance
functions.description: Query the per-token allowance for a spender on a specific token ID.

parameters.name: Owner
parameters.hintText: The token owner address.

parameters.name: Spender
parameters.hintText: The approved spender address.

parameters.name: Token ID
parameters.hintText: The token ID to query.

functions.name: getCollectionMetadata
functions.description: Query the collection-level metadata JSON.

functions.name: supportsInterface
functions.description: Check if the contract supports a specific ERC-165 interface.

parameters.name: Interface ID
parameters.hintText: The ERC-165 interface ID to check (e.g. '0xd9b67a26' for ERC-1155).
